dataset: GAEC JOULIN (real French agricultural farm demo data)

pi_items.source: Task description (line 5), setup_ekylibre.sh (lines 12, 458-461), README.md (implicit through GAEC JOULIN tenant)

pi_items.verified_value: GitHub: https://github.com/ekylibre/first_run-demo.git (real French agricultural farm, Charente-Maritime, 99 supplier entities)
pi_items.source: setup_ekylibre.sh (lines 109-117: 'Real farm demo data (GAEC JOULIN farm from Charente-Maritime)'), README.md (line 8: '99 real supplier entities')

privileged_info_summary: Task uses real agricultural farm data from GAEC JOULIN (Charente-Maritime, France) containing 99 supplier entities. Agent must log into Ekylibre at http://demo.ekylibre.farm:3000 using admin@ekylibre.org/12345678. Task requires creating 3 purchase invoices dated 2024-01-20 from 3 distinct suppliers, validating at least 2 of them to trigger accounting journal entry generation. Success threshold is 60 points with mandatory requirement of at least 2 validated invoices from distinct suppliers.
